findings.finding_text: JSON syntax error from a hand-edit typo would corrupt the ledger and break every downstream consumer; mitigated by a parse-check between edit and test runs and by the resolver run in step 6 which fails loudly on structural defect

A future reader might interpret the 'Resolve by appending' doctrine line as authorizing edits to existing outcomes; the monotonic-guard test in tests/test_ledger_outcome_monotonic.py enforces the append-only semantic in code
